title: Archive #0047-CHEN | Data Heist Incident Reconstruction
description: A corrupted archive record. Event nodes contain a causal gap that must be patched.

events.label: Initialization
events.text:
Timestamp: 2157-03-15 02:47:03
Entity[Dr. Chen] positioned at memory block[Lab 7]. Biometric auth: PASSED.
Portable storage unit: MOUNTED. Server core access control: ACTIVE.
Door lock status: ENGAGED. Target memory block[Server Core]: awaiting entry.

events.label: Core Breach
events.text:
Dr. Chen crossed the corridor and reached the server core blast door.
The door scanner emitted a low tone -- the blast door slid open.
She entered the core, initiated the data extraction process, wrote the classified
data to the storage unit in full, then retraced her steps.
events._bug_note: access_keycard is never provided -- causal absence

events.label: Extraction
events.text:
Data secured. Dr. Chen moved quickly toward the emergency exit.
The moment the final blast door sealed behind her, the alarm system triggered.
The investigation unit arrived three minutes after her departure.
All that remained was an empty data slot.
Archive compile endpoint. Status: ESCAPED.
